author: @totherarf

replies.author: @ThinkingandTinkering
replies.text: lol - for sure lol

author: @tinkmarshino
text: Way to got Cat! your talent is amazing to this old non-talented fella.. all my ancestors where able to paint and draw.. I have a few of my great grandmothers drawing here at the house for the mid 1800;s and painting by my mother and other paintings and drawing from many members of the family .. But for me I need a ruler to draw a stick person..  Carry on! I might just get one of those t Rob.. or wait a bit and see of you can get others to make them.

replies.author: @NorthernKitty
replies.text: I wish I could take credit for the actual artwork, but I hired an artist to do the drawing.  I can only take credit for the concept/design.  I used to do graphic arts when I was young, but no longer have the hands or eyes for it.  I'm lucky when people can still read my writing, LOL!!!  😋  But since I joined this channel, I always wanted to buy a neat t-shirt or mug with Rob on it, and figured other people would, too!  I'd be ecstatic if revenues from merchandise sales helped support the channel.  Rather selfish of me, actually, since I want to see the channel around a long time!! LOL! 😄

replies.author: @tinkmarshino
replies.text: @NorthernKitty An honest gal.. kudos to you.. well it was a great idea.. I am old now and my hands and fingers do not work well themself.. especially in this ❄ cold.. I live in the PNW and have been teaching myself electronic in the winter now because I just can't take the cold any more.. mores the pity.. I love to mess around in my little shop.. anyway good idea I am gonna get some of your artwork myself.. carry on gal..

replies.author: @NorthernKitty
replies.text: @tinkmarshino I can relate to the cold, have lived in the Northern Midwest all of my life, where you can see 30 below zero and 4 feet of snow, but hopefully not on the same day!! 😄  I used to love the cold when I was younger, but starting to feel the weight of it now.  Arizona is looking mighty good these days, LOL!!  😋  Keep up the tinkering!! I'm happy Rob's channel brought me back to it.  🥰

replies.author: @tinkmarshino
replies.text: @NorthernKitty dang girl.. that is way to cold for this old man.. But I used to live in Arizona and Mexico in my youth and it sure does seem appealing in this cold weather..

replies.author: @ThinkingandTinkering
replies.text: I am personally blown away by the awesomeness of it mate

author: @NorthernKitty
text: The true "gift" is your channel, Rob, that you give to us every day!!!  🥰🥰🥰 I just wanted to "give back" in a way that both you and the community could tangibly benefit.  I did want to clarify quickly, the actual art work was done by someone else that I hired to make for this purpose.  I can take credit for the concept and effort to make it happen, but not the completed art.  Afraid I no longer have the steady hand and eyes for drawing anymore, but at least can collaborate with someone who can to bring the idea to life. 😊  At this age, that's at least one "Maker" skill I can still rely on. LOL!!  Really hope that doesn't disappoint or diminish the value of this gift to you, but want to be sure I'm being fair to the artist.

author: @scantrain5007
text:
Dear Rob,
would like to buy the T-Shirt and others from your shop.
Please don't take me wrong ... Teaspring was unknown by myself, very unusal from my point of view.
However: What do you think to sell via Amazon?
I think I'm not standing alone with this question or suggestion.
